mapper.sql: sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.menu_icon, sm.router_nm, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.param, sm.menu_odr, sm.up_menu_id, sm.web_yn, sm.app_yn,

if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm WHERE 1=1

SELECT
sm.created_at, sm.updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY sm.menu_odr

SELECT
sm.created_at, sm.updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY sm.menu_nm
SELECT ghm.grp_id FROM esg.tb_group_hr_map ghm INNER JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hi ON ghm.hr_id = hi.hr_id INNER JOIN esg.tb_user_info ui ON ui.user_id = hi.user_id and hi.user_id=#{createdBy}

SELECT inner_sq.*, ( WITH RECURSIVE menu_path AS ( SELECT m.menu_id, m.menu_nm, m.up_menu_id, m.menu_nm::text AS full_path FROM esg.tb_sys_menu m WHERE m.menu_id = inner_sq.menu_id UNION ALL SELECT parent.menu_id, parent.menu_nm, parent.up_menu_id, (parent.menu_nm || ' > ' || child.full_path)::text FROM esg.tb_sys_menu parent INNER JOIN menu_path child ON parent.menu_id = child.up_menu_id AND child.up_menu_id IS NOT NULL AND child.up_menu_id != '' ) SELECT full_path FROM menu_path WHERE up_menu_id IS NULL OR up_menu_id = '' LIMIT 1 ) AS full_path FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.router_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, sm.param, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_sys_menu child WHERE child.up_menu_id = sm.menu_id ) THEN true ELSE false END AS has_children,
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, MAX(COALESCE(tc.del_ah, 'N')) AS del_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.exl_ah, 'N')) AS exl_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.sav_ah, 'N')) AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, CASE WHEN thr.menu_id IS NOT NULL AND (thr.del_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, NULL)) OR thr.exl_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sav_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sch_ah='N') THEN 'U'
WHEN count(ca.*) > 0 THEN 'G'
ELSE 'I' END AS cmd,
CASE WHEN thr.del_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.del_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS del_ah, CASE WHEN thr.exl_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.exl_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS exl_ah, CASE WHEN thr.sav_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.sav_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_menu ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.comp_id = #{compId}
AND ca.param='W'
AND ca.param='A'
AND ca.grp_id in
#{id}
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'N') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, COALESCE(thr.del_ah, 'N') AS del_ah, COALESCE(thr.exl_ah, 'N') AS exl_ah, COALESCE(thr.sav_ah, 'N') AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm
INNER JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth tc ON tc.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND tc.grp_cd = #{role}
AND tc.param='W'
AND tc.param='A'
LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_menu thr ON thr.comp_id = #{compId} AND thr.hr_id = (select hr_id from esg.tb_hr_info where user_id = #{createdBy}) AND sm.menu_id = thr.menu_id WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.router_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, thr.menu_id, thr.del_ah, thr.exl_ah, thr.sav_ah, thr.sch_ah, tc.del_ah, tc.exl_ah, tc.sav_ah ORDER BY sm.menu_odr ) as sq where (sq.cmd='U' OR sq.cmd='G') AND sq.sch_ah <>'N' ) AS inner_sq

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.router_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, sm.param,
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, MAX(COALESCE(tc.del_ah, 'N')) AS del_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.exl_ah, 'N')) AS exl_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.sav_ah, 'N')) AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, CASE WHEN thr.menu_id IS NOT NULL AND (thr.del_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N')) OR thr.exl_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N')) OR thr.sav_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N')) OR thr.sch_ah='N') THEN 'U'
WHEN count(ca.*) > 0 THEN 'G'
ELSE 'I' END AS cmd,
CASE WHEN thr.del_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.del_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS del_ah, CASE WHEN thr.exl_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.exl_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS exl_ah, CASE WHEN thr.sav_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.sav_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_menu ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.comp_id = #{compId}
AND ca.param='W'
AND ca.param='A'
AND ca.grp_id in
#{id}
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'N') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, COALESCE(thr.del_ah, 'N') AS del_ah, COALESCE(thr.exl_ah, 'N') AS exl_ah, COALESCE(thr.sav_ah, 'N') AS sav_ah FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm
INNER JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth tc ON tc.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND tc.grp_cd = #{role}
AND tc.param='W'
AND tc.param='A'
LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_menu thr ON thr.comp_id = #{compId} AND thr.hr_id = (select hr_id from esg.tb_hr_info where user_id = #{createdBy}) AND sm.menu_id = thr.menu_id WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.router_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, thr.menu_id, thr.del_ah, thr.exl_ah, thr.sav_ah, thr.sch_ah, tc.del_ah, tc.exl_ah, tc.sav_ah ORDER BY sm.menu_odr ) as sq where (sq.cmd='U' OR sq.cmd='G') AND sq.sch_ah <>'N'

SELECT
created_at, updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_sys_menu sm WHERE sm.menu_id = #{menuId}
select comp_id from esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map where user_id = #{createdBy} and orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
select hr_id from esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map where user_id = #{createdBy} and orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_sys_menu ( menu_id, menu_nm, menu_nm_eng, menu_icon, router_nm, router_path, view_path, param, menu_odr, up_menu_id, created_at, created_by, web_yn, app_yn ) VALUES ( #{menuId}, #{menuNm}, #{menuNmEng}, #{menuIcon}, #{routerNm}, #{routerPath}, #{viewPath}, #{param}, #{menuOdr}, #{upMenuId}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{webYn}, #{appYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_sys_menu SET menu_nm = #{menuNm}, menu_nm_eng = #{menuNmEng}, menu_icon = #{menuIcon}, router_nm = #{routerNm}, router_path = #{routerPath}, view_path = #{viewPath}, param = #{param}, menu_odr = #{menuOdr}, up_menu_id = #{upMenuId}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, web_yn = #{webYn}, app_yn = #{appYn} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
